CustomField.description: True when this Opportunity has at least one OpportunityContactRole with IsPrimary = true. Stamped by OpportunityTriggerHandler on save so the Negotiation_Requires_Primary_Contact validation rule can gate the Negotiation transition — a validation rule cannot traverse to child OpportunityContactRole records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maintained by the Opportunity trigger — do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Has Primary Contact Role
